subject: unable to import motion-corrected frames for TS
body:
HI Dimitry,

I am trying to import frames that were motion corrected outside Warp and I 
followed the guidance described here 
http://www.warpem.com/warp/?page_id=378, but it seems that something may 
have broken because, when I tried to build stacks for imod, warp failed to 
import. I have chekced that the file names are not altered, so I am not 
sure what is going wrong here. I was able to do this with the warp 1.0.9 
from last year (ca. June-August). Have TS import steps have changed since 
then?

Best,
Pranav
